children.heading: Controlled substance
children.label: 1 Controlled substance
children.text: The term “controlled substance” has the meaning given such term in .section 802 of title 21

children.heading: Drug-related crime
children.label: 2 Drug-related crime
children.text: The term “drug-related crime” means the illegal manufacture, sale, distribution, use, or possession with intent to manufacture, sell, distribute, or use a controlled substance.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development.

children.heading: Recipient
children.label: 5 Recipient
children.text: The term “recipient”, when used in reference to the Native American Housing Assistance and Self-Determination Act of 1996 [ et seq.], has the meaning given such term in section 4 of such Act [].25 U.S.C. 410125 U.S.C. 4103

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 6 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given the term in section 4(12) of the Native American Housing Assistance and Self Determination Act of 1996, .125 U.S.C. 4103(12)See References in Text note below.1
